claim: The text encodes Hebrew using a substitution system
evidence_against: Proposed substitution produced incoherent text. Could not be applied consistently across the manuscript. Word structure of Voynichese does not match Hebrew morphology.

tests_run.details: Proposed substitution produced incoherent text. Could not be applied consistently across the manuscript. Word structure of Voynichese does not match Hebrew morphology.

reasoning: Historical attempt by Stephen Hales (2003). Cipher type: simple substitution. Proposed language: Hebrew.
source: Discussed on Voynich mailing list; Kennedy & Churchill (2004)
